intro: This Algorithm Theoretical Basis Document (ATBD) outlines the methodology employed for producing the CLCplus Backbone 2023, a crucial component of the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service. The document details the product's characteristics, input data from Sentinel-2, and algorithms used for land cover classification across Europe. It describes pre-processing steps, model training using a Temporal Convolutional Neural Network, and post-processing techniques to ensure consistency and accuracy, serving as a technical reference for the CLCplus Backbone 2023.
